The '''Bo Charmian Racing School''' was a [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] school located inside one of the concession concourses of the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
